item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am a Mechanical Engineering student at IUBAT with a resolute trajectory toward aerospace technology and a future at NASA. My journey is defined by a passion for discovery—from identifying celestial bodies to engineering innovative mechanical systems.

Current Academic Focus (6th Semester)

Currently immersed in advanced studies at IUBAT, including:

  • Manufacturing Processes & Economics
  • Linear Algebra & Electronics
  • Independent Research: Self-studying human anatomy and physiology to explore the intersection of biomechanics and aerospace engineering.

Key Achievements

  • NASA Citizen Scientist Award: Discovered 3 provisional Asteroids via NASA JPL Laboratory (2019).
  • Presidency Gold Medal Award (2019).
  • National Science Festivals: 14 Champion titles for Project Displays across Bangladesh.
  • Olympiads: Multi-award winner in Physics and Biology Olympiads.

Leadership & Vision

  • Co-Founder, H.O.L.M.E.S. Research Group: Establishing a four-founder framework for cross-disciplinary mechanical research.
  • Hult Prize Competitor: Developing innovative social entrepreneurship solutions for global challenges.

item.title: The H.O.L.M.E.S. Initiative
item.description:
Here we detail the constitutional framework and primary objectives of the four-founder H.O.L.M.E.S. research group.

Our current focus lies in bridging the gap between theoretical mechanical engineering and practical, aerospace-applicable innovation.

item.title: Hult Prize Competition 2026
item.description: I am currently competing in the Hult Prize. We are leveraging my mechanical engineering background and their software expertise to build a business model that addresses critical sustainability goals.

item.title: NASA Citizen Scientist: Asteroid Discovery
item.description: In 2019, I participated in a citizen science initiative with the NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory (JPL). Through meticulous data analysis, I successfully identified three provisional asteroids. This achievement remains a cornerstone of my commitment to aerospace exploration.

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: If you wish to discuss aerospace initiatives, mechanical engineering collaborations, or my research with the H.O.L.M.E.S. group, please use the secure channel below.
